styleGuide.characterStyle: TV talent aesthetic with natural human proportions, professional broadcast makeup. Soft edge rendering without hard outlines, subtle skin texture, catchlights in eyes. Avoid cartoon proportions, cel-shading, or mobile game tropes.
styleGuide.lightingApproach: Professional three-point lighting: 45-degree key light with show-specific color temperature (2700K-5600K), 40-70% fill, rim/back light for separation. Atmospheric depth haze, lens bloom, natural vignettes (15-25%), subtle film grain (3-8%).
moodBoards: Family Feud (Steve Harvey era) - blue LED backdrop, gold survey board
The Bachelor (ABC) - rose ceremony candlelight, soft focus cinematography
Shark Tank (ABC) - industrial warehouse, dramatic spotlights
Survivor (CBS) - tribal council firelight, documentary realism
Roger Deakins cinematography - controlled naturalistic lighting
